'''鈭歽-w-w-p''' ('''kayawepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calcify|calcify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calcify|calcify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-w-w-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayawepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyawepoko|thiyawepoko]] || [[word:jiyawepoko|jiyawepoko]] || [[word:shiyawepoko|shiyawepoko]] || [[word:kiyawepoko|kiyawepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyawepoko|thuthuyawepoko]] || [[word:jujuyawepoko|jujuyawepoko]] || [[word:shushuyawepoko|shushuyawepoko]] || [[word:kukuyawepoko|kukuyawepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyawepoko|theyawepoko]] || [[word:jeyawepoko|jeyawepoko]] || [[word:sheyawepoko|sheyawepoko]] || [[word:keyawepoko|keyawepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyawepoko|thothoyawepoko]] || [[word:jojoyawepoko|jojoyawepoko]] || [[word:shoshoyawepoko|shoshoyawepoko]] || [[word:kokoyawepoko|kokoyawepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyawepoko|thoyawepoko]] || [[word:joyawepoko|joyawepoko]] || [[word:shoyawepoko|shoyawepoko]] || [[word:koyawepoko|koyawepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yawepoko|th忙yawepoko]] || [[word:j忙yawepoko|j忙yawepoko]] || [[word:sh忙yawepoko|sh忙yawepoko]] || [[word:k忙yawepoko|k忙yawepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawepoko|thayawepoko]] || [[word:jayawepoko|jayawepoko]] || [[word:shayawepoko|shayawepoko]] || [[word:kayawepoko|kayawepoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
